description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The front facade features large, arched windows and a central entryway accessed by a short set of steps and a ramp. The rear of the house opens to a private backyard with a swimming pool, surrounded by a low fence and several trees for privacy and shade. The exterior is primarily finished in a smooth, gray material, with white window frames and accents. The house includes a driveway leading to a garage, and the rooftop has open areas that may serve as terraces or garden spaces. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor living, and functional urban aesthetics.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large arched windows, and a backyard pool, finished in gray with white accents. The design features a central entryway, garage, and private outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, arched windows, steps, ramp, and driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the start of the backyard area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, trees, and fenced enclosure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool area, trees, and the side of the house with rectangular windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large arched windows on the front
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with steps, a ramp, and a simple door framed by large arched windows
